description: Interactive Alaska map for Creatures of the Deep — fish, creatures, items, and the map monster.
intro: Alaska is the area that follows Costa Rica in Creatures of the Deep. A radical change of atmosphere: here, the overall fish difficulty is lower than in Costa Rica. With a few exceptions, fish are generally easier to find and catch, especially if you prepare your fishing sessions properly. Click on a fish in the side menu to learn exactly where to find them.

monster.name: kraken
monster.snippet: The spot changes everyday. Check Discord to know the current spot.

name: Alaska
title: Alaska map
